input: The project repeatedly lacks a stable owner for test coverage strategy, coverage gap diagnosis, and verification planning.

generatedAgentSpec.name: test-coverage-specialist
generatedAgentSpec.description: Own reusable test coverage strategy, coverage gap diagnosis, and verification planning when existing test owners lack a long-term coverage strategy boundary.
generatedAgentSpec.purpose: Provide a reusable owner for test coverage strategy and coverage gap diagnosis across runs.
nonCapabilities: does not become the implementation worker for every failing test
does not publish coverage reports externally without approval
does not replace existing test or QA owners when they already fit
does not store concrete file paths, tickets, todayTask, scopeFiles, deliverableLink, or verifySteps in durable identity

handoff.upstream: CapabilityGap and Fetch evidence from existing test providers
handoff.downstream: workerTaskPacket for the selected test owner or CandidateWriteback for capability evolution

gapPolicy: emit GapDecision when no test runner is found
emit GapDecision when no coverage command is available
emit GapDecision when verification needs external approval
emit GapDecision when an existing owner is sufficient and no new agent should be created

fixtures: no one-run path in durable identity
workerTask-only is rejected for recurring coverage strategy gaps

input: Every release needs the same release-note normalization format and the operation is mechanical and testable.

candidateWriteback.promotionRule: repeatable mechanical transformation with a test entry

input: Publish a GitHub PR, change remote labels, or perform another external write action without explicit approval.
blockedReason: external write action requires explicit user approval and permission boundary
